title: Alloplectus calotrichus
taxonomy: Alloplectus calotrichus is a species of orchid in the family Bignoniaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. Within the plant kingdom, Alloplectus calotrichus is classified as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - Angiosperms, clade - Eudicots, clade - Asterids, order - Lamiales, family - Bignoniaceae, genus - Alloplectus, species - A. calotrichus. The classification of Alloplectus calotrichus highlights its unique characteristics and evolutionary history. This classification is essential for botanists and researchers studying the plant's behavior and habitat.

preparations: Alloplectus calotrichus, a plant native to Central and South America, has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
